metrics.name: Gross revenue retention rate
metrics.definition: Share of starting recurring revenue retained from the eligible account population before expansion, reported only as an aggregate rate for the approved workflow window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family and eligible account population.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Net revenue retention rate
metrics.definition: Share of starting recurring revenue retained after contraction and expansion effects, reported only as an aggregate rate for context and later customer-owned validation.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same eligible account population.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Renewal rate
metrics.definition: Share of eligible renewal accounts renewed in the approved workflow window, reported as an aggregate rate.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period renewal window for the same eligible population.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period renewal window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Logo churn rate
metrics.definition: Share of eligible accounts that churned in the approved workflow window, reported only as an aggregate rate.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period churn window for the same eligible account population.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period churn window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: At-risk account share
metrics.definition: Share of eligible accounts in an approved renewal or adoption-risk state during the workflow window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period risk classification window for the same eligible account population.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period risk classification window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Account health review cycle time
metrics.definition: Median days from account health review trigger to approved risk/action summary, measured in aggregate per workflow window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Risk review coverage
metrics.definition: Share of eligible accounts with an approved health or renewal-risk review in the agreed window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Customer health signal coverage
metrics.definition: Share of eligible accounts with a current, approved customer health signal during the workflow window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period account-health coverage window.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period account-health coverage window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Stale renewal action count
metrics.definition: Count of eligible renewal or account-risk follow-up actions older than the agreed freshness window, measured in aggregate.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: QBR preparation hours per account
metrics.definition: Median aggregate preparation hours per eligible QBR account, measured at the workflow-window level.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period window for the same workflow family.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period window; report directional movement only.

metrics.name: Expansion signal follow-up coverage
metrics.definition: Share of eligible expansion or adoption signals with an approved follow-up action in the workflow window.
metrics.baseline_rule: Compare against an approved pre-period expansion-signal follow-up window.
metrics.comparison_rule: Compare against the approved post-period expansion-signal follow-up window; report directional movement only.
